fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. `ticket scan --force` re-reads every ticket.toml from disk and updates the redb index + Tantivy index to match, overwriting stale entries. 2. Detects manually-edited ticket.toml files (state changes, field updates) and reconciles them. 3. Reports which tickets were updated during force sync. 4. Safe: never deletes ticket.toml files. 5. Existing scan (without --force) behavior unchanged.
fields.title: [ticket-system] Force sync: reconcile index from disk ticket.toml
